nasb.text: But the Lord said to him, “Surely I will be with you, and you shall defeat Midian as one man.”

esv.text: And the Lord said to him, “But I will be with you, and you shall strike the Midianites as one man.”

cnv.text: 耶和華對他說：“因為我必與你同在，你就必擊打米甸人，像擊打一人一樣。”

ccb.text: 耶和华说：“我必与你同在，你必如击打一人一样击打米甸人。”
